message:
test(tx): extend proptests with Draft and RolledBack state variants

Add missing MissionTxState::Draft and RolledBack to arbitrary state
generators. Correct FullyRolledBack outcome to expect RolledBack state.
Add RolledBack to terminal and invalid-start-state sets.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
